name: Reservoir South
description: You are standing along the southern edge of a broad reservoir basin whose state depends entirely on decisions made upstream. If the dam is functioning as intended, this is a deep, controlled body of water. If not, it is an exposed mudflat still arranged as though water were expected to return. A path follows the stream east and west, while a steep track climbs southwest along the rim of a chasm. To the southeast, the terrain funnels into a canyon, carrying whatever remains onward.
